ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proper Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was recalled at 9:50am. The Court was advised by the Clerk that David Spolum was give approval to appear by Court Call prior to commencement of court. The Court noted that an Order to Appear has already been issued and Mr. Spolum should have been here in person. The Status on filing of proper Inventory & Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution, and the Order to Appear are continued to March 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to find out why Mr. Spolum was not present, why he has failed to file the required petition, and why he is in violation of his duties.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proper Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator David Spolum to appear on March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proper Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Spolum appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Spolum stated that he has an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution in his possession. The status hearing is continued to February 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proper Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Jan-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that nothing has been filed and expressed concern stating that the Estate may have already been distributed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on January 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, why an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution have not been filed and to answer whether he made any impermissible distributions. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
